title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 2026
summary: Twenty-four regulatory events converge across the Americas through September, with the United States driving 16 separate initiatives spanning stablecoin AML programs, DeFi enforcement expansion, and fundamental Bank Secrecy Act reform. Canada implements FATF Travel Rule enforcement while Latin America's largest economies—Chile, Colombia, Argentina—shift from legal ambiguity to active VASP licensing regimes.
